User Feedback: Love the decentralized architecture. Waku messaging is fast enough for my needs.
Great UI/UX, the glassmorphism looks very premium.
Paying 1 XLM to start a chat is a great way to prevent spam bots.
Had some issues with Firefox blocking DNS for peer discovery, but the relay fallback worked perfectly.
E2E encryption using tweetnacl gives me peace of mind.
Integration with Freighter wallet was seamless, very easy to sign.
I wish I could send attachments natively without IPFS being slow sometimes.
Soroban smart contracts for wallet registration is a very neat approach.
The hybrid caching using Waku Store is really cool, messages load instantly now.
Simple, secure, and fully decentralized. Exactly what Web3 needs.
Would love to see an Android app version of this.
The 1 XLM spam prevention fee is genius. Finally, no random spam chats.
A bit confusing to get testnet XLM initially, but the Friendbot helps.
Messages sync well across tabs.
The UI is responsive and works great on my mobile browser.
Very cool project. Keep up the good work on the Soroban integration.
